falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index closes above 5,200 (a 12% increase from current levels) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp bullish breakout would contradict the HOLD signal and indicate a pattern divergence from the bottom_2024_aug reference

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-day average true range (ATR) increases by 40% compared to the ATR at the time of the bottom_2024_aug pattern
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A surge in volatility would invalidate the current low-volatility HOLD stance by showing unanticipated market chaos

falsification_conditions.condition: The U.S. 10-year Treasury yield drops below 3.8% (a 200 basis point decline from current levels) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A dramatic bond market rally would contradict the blowoff score's implication of risk-on dynamics and invalidate the HOLD position

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
